3055600.name: Timebound Vampire
3055600.description:
Welcome to Timebound Vampire - an exhilarating game where you take on the role of a werewolf fending off humans. Your goal is to survive as long as possible in this magical forest where danger lurks at every turn. Prepare for a challenging and dynamic gameplay experience where every decision counts and every second matters.

Game Features:

- Play as a werewolf defending against humans
- Dynamic and challenging gameplay
- Magical forest as the primary game setting
